Module c868final
Package com.ogborn.c868final.Controller

Class ViewAppointments

java.lang.Object
com.ogborn.c868final.Controller.ViewAppointments
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class ViewAppointments extends Object implements javafx.fxml.Initializable
controls the View appointments form

    sets the table view to show all appointments for the current CALENDAR month e.g.
    void
    onSelectShowNext30Days(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
    included due to inconsistent understanding of the word "monthly" sets the tableview to show all appointments in the next 30 days
    void
    onSelectShowNext7Days(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
    included due to inconsistent understanding of the word "weekly" sets the tableview to show all appointments in the next 7 days
    void
    onSelectShowWeekly(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
    sets the table view to show all appointments for the current CALENDAR week

      public ViewAppointments()

  • Method Details

    • onAddButtonClick

      public void onAddButtonClick(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
      opens the add appointment form
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - the add button is clicked

    • onUpdateButtonClick

      public void onUpdateButtonClick(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws Exception
      Opens the add appointment form, but loads an appointment to update.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - the update button is clicked
      Throws:
      Exception - any exception that is thrown

    • onDeleteButtonClick

      public void onDeleteButtonClick(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws Exception
      Deletes the selected appointment after confirmation and displays a success dialog. This method first shows a confirmation dialog with the appointment ID and type. If the user confirms, the appointment is deleted, and a success dialog is displayed. The TableView is refreshed to reflect the updated list of appointments.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - The event triggered by the delete button click.
      Throws:
      Exception - If a database error occurs during the deletion process.

    • onBackButtonClick

      public void onBackButtonClick(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
      returns to the main menu
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - the main menu button is clicked

    • onSelectShowAll

      public void onSelectShowAll(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
      sets the table view to show all appointments. .
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - the show all radio button is selected note that this will be preselected by default

    • onSelectShowWeekly

      public void onSelectShowWeekly(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws Exception
      sets the table view to show all appointments for the current CALENDAR week
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - the radio button is toggled
      Throws:
      Exception - handling for any exception if one is thrown

    • onSelectShowNext7Days

      public void onSelectShowNext7Days(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws Exception
      included due to inconsistent understanding of the word "weekly" sets the tableview to show all appointments in the next 7 days
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - the radio button is selected
      Throws:
      SQLException - any sql error that is thrown
      Exception

    • onSelectShowMonthly

      public void onSelectShowMonthly(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws Exception
      sets the table view to show all appointments for the current CALENDAR month e.g. December
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - the radio button is toggled
      Throws:
      Exception - handling for any exception if thrown

    • onSelectShowNext30Days

      public void onSelectShowNext30Days(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent) throws Exception
      included due to inconsistent understanding of the word "monthly" sets the tableview to show all appointments in the next 30 days
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - the radio button is selected
      Throws:
      SQLException - any sql error that is thrown
      Exception
